   - Tests single recipient without personal name (just email)
   - Tests multiple recipients
   - Tests null/empty addresses

- "To: Test User" (with space) ✓
- "To: test@example.com" (with space) ✓
- "To: Test User 1,Test User 2" (with space) ✓
